text.message: Thank you! You like the book?
That is also a great book.
I would have taken it. Too quick
im clearly in the worst position
so i dont have to trade with oj
its not like i have a chance
and see that i dont have army
and getting to 10 will be very difficult
Who do you think is the biggest threat?
red just as likely as road
dont listen to oj... its still him
even oj still says its him
red is such a spaz lol
He's gettin in my ear lol
Regardless, I think 10 ore is the best block when available
thats fine, but it waws a horrible steal
now we are praying for a 7
we just have to be careful
its not completely urgent yet but yea
until someone else secures road yea
I wish I felt that way too
focused in on me too much
blue needs to battle black for road
i think the focus was warranted
well blue is prob a card or two aaway
i cant get road or arm
you were way ahead in production
you need to build 2 roads here
so i can cut off black maybe
how does cutting me off help anyone lol
and stops you from road settle
which i just realized is vulnerable lol
that would give you the win
can you guys help me cut him off?
no one would trade you that
but if OJ does and settles he wins
